game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Side-scrolling run-and-gun platformer focused on precision movement, weapon-level management, and traversal upgrades. Core loop: navigate interconnected 2D stages, jump/dodge hazards, and swap between distinct weapons while collecting triangular EXP to level each weapon from 1→3; taking damage spills EXP and can de-level weapons, reducing damage and fire patterns. Movement emphasizes tight control, variable-height jumps, recoil/knockback handling, water buoyancy and currents, fans/wind, and environmental traps (spikes, crushers). Arsenal includes weapons with unique utility and ammo rules—e.g., basic pistol that can upgrade into a powerful charge-beam, a machine gun that can propel the player upward when fired downward at higher levels, bouncing fireballs for corridor control, arcing blades for close-range burst, and missiles with splash damage and capacity upgrades. Progression layers: permanent max-HP increases via Life Capsules; missile capacity expansions; key mobility items (Booster jetpack variants with different thrust behaviors, and gear that enables extended underwater traversal). Bosses are pattern-driven, multi-phase checks that reward positioning, invulnerability-window awareness, and mid-fight weapon swapping; healing opportunities are limited to save/refill stations, so resource preservation matters. Level structure is hub-and-spoke with backtracking and optional secrets; some weapons/items are mutually exclusive or permanently upgraded, creating divergent builds and routing. Many ports add challenge modes such as Boss Rush/Time Attack that distill combat and movement mastery.
game_info.description: Navigate through interconnected platforming stages as a powerful agent equipped with an arsenal of upgradable weapons. Collect triangular EXP to level up your weapons from 1 to 3, each level improving damage and firing patterns. Beware: taking damage spills EXP and can de-level your weapons! Master precision movement including variable jumps, weapon recoil, water physics, and environmental hazards. Find Life Capsules to increase max HP, discover mobility upgrades like the Booster jetpack, and defeat the multi-phase boss to win. Save stations restore health and save progress. Strategic weapon swapping and resource management are key to victory.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, look up/down
Space: Jump (hold for higher jumps)
Z: Shoot current weapon
Shift: Cycle weapons
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over)
